project.description: The name of the project in which to place the Signal Store.  Valid project types are: app, data-access, feature, ui, or utils.
project.x-prompt: What project would you like to add the Signal Store?

directory.description: A directory where the signal store is placed.  If not provided, the Signal Store will be placed in the 'stores' folder relative to the source root of the project.

export.description: Whether to export the generated file as part of the public API of the project.

providedInRoot.description: If true, the Signal Store will be provided in the root injector.  If false, the store will need to be provided manually.

skipLogger.description: Skip adding logger feature to the Signal Store.
